Home → Koukaki → Marble House

Marble House

★★☆☆☆
from €55 /night
Check Availability

Overview

Family-run pension with garden courtyard. Simple rooms but incredible value and warm hospitality.

Who Should Consider Marble House

Marble House is a 2-star budget price-signal hotel in Koukaki, with no Acropolis-view signal in the current dataset and no rooftop-bar signal in the current dataset. It is tagged for budget, long stays, self-catering.

  • Compare the area on the Koukaki hotel guide.
  • See broader criteria-based picks in Best Hotels in Athens.
  • For rooftop stays, compare Athens rooftop bar hotels.

Amenities

KitchenWiFiGarden

✓ Pros

  • Super affordable
  • Lovely garden
  • Friendly owners

✗ Cons

  • Very basic
  • Shared facilities

Location

Located in Koukaki, 5-8 min walk to the Acropolis.

🏛️ 5-8 min to Acropolis
🚇 5-10 min to metro

Quick Facts

  • Neighborhood: Koukaki
  • Star Rating: 2 stars
  • Price Range: €44-83
  • Acropolis View: No
